title: cyanthillium montanum
intro: Cyanthillium montanum, also known as Ironweed, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Cyanthillium montanum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat digestive problems. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and flowers are commonly used in herbal remedies.
